name: Venison Stew #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the cubed meat in the oil.
2. Add two cups of water, then the rest of the ingredients (onion, Worcestershire sauce, spices).
3. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
4. Remove bay leaves.
5. Add carrots and potatoes.
6. Cook another 30-45 minutes or until tender.
